input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.2.6
            TITLE: all batteries using chemistries other than lead acid must be presented at technical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.2.6: All batteries using chemistries other than lead acid must be presented at Technical Inspection
T.9.2.6 All batteries using chemistries other than lead acid must be presented at Technical Inspection 
with markings identifying it for comparison to a datasheet or other documentation proving 
the pack and supporting electronics meet all rules requirements
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 73 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: All batteries using chemistries other than lead acid must be presented at Technical Inspection with markings identifying it for comparison to a datasheet or other documentation proving the pack and supporting electronics meet all rules requirements
